hero.tagline: I like building software for the future

about.label: 01 · ABOUT ME
about.title: ABOUT ME
about.intro_1: Hi, I'm Carlos. Frontend developer obsessed with the
about.intro_2: nobody asks for but everyone feels.
about.p1: Five years ago I discovered that building software gave me the same satisfaction as assembling furniture: seeing how the pieces fit and everything holds together. Since then I haven't stopped.
about.p2: Today I work with React, Node and NestJS building web products — from dense dashboards to landings that have to load in 1.2s on 3G. I like the side where engineering becomes design.
about.p3: When I'm not in the editor: specialty coffee, video games, hardware and reading documentation for fun (yes, I said it).

projectsData.mediRecord: Web system to manage patients, appointments and medical history.
projectsData.myFarmer: Mobile app for managing livestock and crops for farmers.
